name: quicker-rpc
description: Headless Quicker action authoring: qkrpc MCP, authoring skills, and workspace patch (P0–P7).

interface.shortDescription: Quicker action authoring via qkrpc MCP
interface.longDescription: Bundle qkrpc MCP with authoring skills for headless Quicker action editing aligned with QuickerAgent.
defaultPrompt: Use quicker-rpc to list and edit Quicker actions in this workspace.
Run qkrpc_health before authoring; use workspace_program to patch .quicker/ after disk edits.
